title: Jurisdiction-First Answers
imgAlt: A clean UI card showing a jurisdiction selector and citations

content.summary: Verdictu starts every response by locking the jurisdiction. No more mixing Danish rules with German courts.
content.section1: Pick a country (and optionally region/court level) before you ask. The assistant then uses the correct legal framework and labels what is EU-wide vs national implementation.
quote: If you don’t anchor jurisdiction first, legal AI becomes confident nonsense.
content.section2: Result: answers you can actually trust—because every claim points back to the right system and the right source.

title: Source-Backed Clarity
imgAlt: A document with highlighted citations next to a response

content.summary: Every important claim can be traced to a source. The user doesn’t have to “take AI’s word for it.”
content.section1: Verdictu prioritizes primary sources: official registers, ministries, agencies, and courts. When sources conflict or are uncertain, we say so and show where the truth lives.
quote: Citations aren’t decoration—they’re the trust mechanism.
content.section2: Result: less risk, faster verification, and a clear path from question → authority → answer.

title: Compare Mode for Documents
imgAlt: Two documents side-by-side with differences highlighted

content.summary: Drop in two documents and ask what changed, what’s risky, and what’s missing.
content.section1: Verdictu summarizes differences by topic (payment, termination, liability, privacy). It separates quoted text from analysis so you can review without confusion.
quote: Tell us your goal: reduce risk, speed review, or ensure compliance.
content.section2: Result: faster reviews, fewer missed clause changes, and clearer next actions.

title: Draft Mode Templates
imgAlt: A structured editor with templates and sections

content.summary: Start from a template and get a clean first draft with the right tone and structure.
content.section1: Use predefined templates (letters, clauses, short memos). Ask for variants (formal/friendly), and export when ready.
quote: AI drafts best when you give constraints: jurisdiction, audience, goal.
content.section2: Result: polished drafts faster—with your facts and your control.

title: Smart Workflows
imgAlt: A visual workflow diagram connecting document steps and approvals

content.summary: Legal work is repetitive by design. Workflows let you encode the repetition once—and run it reliably every time.
content.section1: Build multi-step sequences: intake → research → draft → review → export. Each step can trigger the next automatically, with the right context carried through. No copy-pasting between tools.
quote: The goal isn't speed for its own sake—it's removing the steps that add no value.
content.section2: Result: less manual coordination, fewer errors, and a clear audit trail from question to completed document.

title: AI Text Editor
imgAlt: A clean document editor with inline AI suggestions highlighted

content.summary: Write legal documents the way you think—then let the AI improve structure, tone, and accuracy without leaving the editor.
content.section1: Inline suggestions appear as you type. Accept, reject, or ask for alternatives. The editor understands jurisdiction context, so suggestions stay legally relevant—not just grammatically polished.
quote: A good legal editor doesn't change what you mean. It makes sure the words say exactly that.
content.section2: Result: first drafts in minutes, not hours—with jurisdiction-aware suggestions you control at every step.

title: Local Private AI
imgAlt: A server icon with a lock, representing on-device AI processing

content.summary: Run the AI entirely on your machine. No data sent to external servers. No exposure. No exceptions.
content.section1: Local Private AI is built for firms and teams where data sovereignty is non-negotiable. The model runs in your environment—on your hardware or your private cloud. Client documents, internal memos, and sensitive queries never leave your control.
quote: Privacy isn't a feature you add on. It's an architecture decision you make from day one.
content.section2: Result: full AI capability with zero data leakage—suitable for regulated industries, confidential matters, and jurisdictions with strict data residency requirements.

title: 100% Security
imgAlt: A shield icon over a document, representing encrypted legal data

content.summary: Every document, query, and response is protected end-to-end. Security is not an add-on tier—it is the default.
content.section1: Verdictu uses end-to-end encryption for data in transit and at rest. Access is role-scoped, every action is logged, and the architecture is zero-knowledge by design. Audit trails are exportable and tamper-evident.
quote: Your clients trust you with their most sensitive information. We treat it accordingly.
content.section2: Result: compliance-ready infrastructure, a clear chain of custody for every document, and the confidence to handle matters where stakes are highest.
